concept: Players engage in an idle/merge game by merging identical planes to evolve them into higher-tier, more powerful aircraft that automatically fly on a track, generating coins over time. Merging two planes of the same level creates a next-level plane, which generates coins faster, with coins used to buy new planes or upgrade track capacity. Progression is driven by evolving planes to unlock new types and increase coin generation, leading to new tracks or environments.
name: Epic Plane Evolution
